svg.title: Banking application architecture — five-layer overview
svg.desc: Layered architecture diagram: Presentation, Application, Agent/Service, Integration, and Platform/Data layers with their component chips. Click any component to learn more.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does HTML/CSS serve the banking frontend?')
sendPrompt('How is the browser session managed in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What is Bootstrap Cache used for in this banking app?')
sendPrompt('What routes do the Route Endpoints manage in this banking app?')
sendPrompt('What API Endpoints are exposed in this banking application?')
sendPrompt('How does OIDC Callback work in this authentication flow?')
sendPrompt('What does the Banking Agent do in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does the Chat Agent do in this banking architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does the Data Service provide in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does the Statement Service provide in this banking app?')
sendPrompt('What is SQLCL MCP Server and what does it integrate with?')
sendPrompt('What is OCI OS MCP Server and what does it integrate with?')
sendPrompt('What is Identity Domain in this OCI banking architecture?')
sendPrompt('What is OCI Enterprise AI and how is it used in this banking app?')
sendPrompt('How is Oracle Database used in this banking application?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in OCI Object Storage for this banking app?')
